login.title: Login
login.registerLink: If you haven't registered yet, click here
login.errorRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
login.errorServer: Could not connect to the server. Please check your connection and try again.

register.title: Register
register.loginLink: Already have an account? Click here to login
register.errorRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
register.errorServer: Could not connect to the server. Please check your connection and try again.

normal.label: Normal Mode
normal.description: Normal mode that follows the classical rules of the gamey game. Play against a bot and try to connect the three sizes to win.

local.label: Local Mode
local.description: Normal mode that follows the classical rules of the gamey game. Play locally against a friend and try to connect the three sizes to win.

why_not.label: WhY not
why_not.description: Play with inverted rules: the first player to connect all three edges of the board LOSES.

account.hint: Log in to save your match history and appear in global rankings.

userMenu.title: USER PROFILE
userMenu.joinUs: Join us to save your progress!
userMenu.logInForProfile: Log in to access your profile settings and match history.

mainMenu.title: Main Menu
mainMenu.welcome: Welcome to Game Y. Here, you will obtain a complete help support.
mainMenu.whatIsGameYText: Game Y is a strategy board game. Each player is assigned two opposite sides of the board and must connect them with a consecutive chain of their pieces.
mainMenu.gettingStartedItem1: From the main menu you can log in to your account or create a new one.
mainMenu.gettingStartedItem2: You can also play as a guest.
mainMenu.gettingStartedItem3: Once inside, select your game mode and board size to start playing.
mainMenu.moreInfo: Select the help window for each specific feature for more information.

gameRules.title: Game Rules
gameRules.objectiveText: Connect all three sides of the board with a consecutive chain before your opponent does.
gameRules.takingTurnsText1: Players alternate placing one piece per turn on any empty cell of the board.
gameRules.takingTurnsText2: Once placed, pieces cannot be moved or removed.
gameRules.takingTurnsText3: The player turn is indicated on the screen.
gameRules.winningText: The first player to connect all three side wins. The game ends immediately when a winner is detected.
gameRules.timerText1: Each match has a timer running from the start.
gameRules.timerText2: Your total time is recorded at the end of the game and used in the rankings if you are logged in.

account.title: Account
account.intro: You can play Game Y as a guest or with a registered account.
account.playAsGuestText1: Play a game immediately without creating an account.
account.playAsGuestText2: Your matches won't be saved and you won't appear in the rankings.
account.createAccountText: Register with your email to get a persistent profile. Once registered, all your wins, losses, and best times will be recorded.
account.logInText1: Log in with your email and password to access your full profile.
account.logInText2: Your match history, stats, and ranking position are all tied to your account.
account.logOutText: You can log out at any time from the user menu in the top right corner.

replay.title: REPLAY
replay.noMoveData:
No move data available for this match.
Only games played after this feature was added can be replayed.

statistics.noMatchData: No match data yet. Play some games to see your statistics!
